theory.canonical_statement: delta T\_\{ij\} = alpha/, frac\{G M\_\{rm acc\}\}\{R\textasciicircum{}3\} hat n\_i hat n\_j,
theory.technical_interpretation: delta T\_\{ij\} = alpha/, frac\{G M\_\{rm acc\}\}\{R\textasciicircum{}3\} hat n\_i hat n\_j,

canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
hat{\mathcal{H}}_{\text{cymatic}} = \int_{\Omega} \hat{\rho}(\mathbf{r}, t) \Phi_{\text{acoustic}}[\omega, \mathbf{k}, t] \, d^3\mathbf{r} \equiv \sum_{n=1}^{153,600} \gamma_n (\hat{b}_n^\dagger + \hat{b}_n) \hat{a}_n^\dagger \hat{a}_n
\]
\[
Q_T = \frac{1}{4\pi^2} \int_{T^2 \times T^2} F \wedge F \in \mathbb{Z}, \quad \text{subject to } \frac{dQ_T}{dt} = \mathcal{L}_{\text{diss}} \equiv 0
\]
